title: Anthropic 遭用户起诉涉嫌夸大订阅使用额度
content: A consumer is suing Anthropic, seeking class-action status for subscribers since April. The lawsuit alleges the company misrepresented usage limits for its Max 5x and Max 20x subscription plans, claiming high-priced AI services delivered fewer usage credits than advertised. The complaint targets $200 monthly plans that reportedly proved insufficient for users despite their premium cost.
eventKey: anthropic-遭用户起诉涉嫌夸大订阅使用额度
normalizedTitle: anthropic 遭用户起诉涉嫌夸大订阅使用额度

summary: A consumer is suing Anthropic, seeking class-action status for subscribers since April. The lawsuit alleges the company misrepresented usage limits for its Max 5x and Max 20x subscription plans, claiming high-priced AI services delivered fewer usage credits than advertised. The complaint targets $200 monthly plans that reportedly proved insufficient for users despite their premium cost.

title: AI Agent Failure Detection and Root Cause Analysis with Strands Evals
content: In this post, we walk you through calling the detector functions to diagnose real agent failures. You learn how to interpret their structured output: categorized failures with confidence scores, causal chains linking root causes to downstream symptoms, and fix recommendations specifying whether a change belongs in your system prompt or tool definitions. You also learn how to integrate detection into your evaluation pipeline for automated diagnosis on every test run. Artificial Intelligence AI Agent Failure Detection and Root Cause Analysis with Strands Evals by Po-Shin Chen , Aaron Farntrog , Abhishek Kumar , JJ Cho , Muhyun Kim , and Ninad Kulkarni on 15 JUN 2026 in Amazon Bedrock , Intermediate (200) , Technical How-to Permalink Share When your AI agent fails in production, knowing that it failed is only the beginning. The harder question is why it failed and what to fix. Traditional evaluation tells you “this agent scored 60 percent on goal completion,” but leaves you manually reviewing execution traces to understand what went wrong. For teams operating agents at scale, this manual diagnosis becomes the bottleneck between detecting a problem and shipping a fix. Detectors in the Strands Evals SDK remove this bottleneck by automatically identifying failures in agent execution traces and performing root cause analysis, so you can reduce diagnosis time from hours to minutes. In this post, we walk you through calling the detector functions to diagnose real agent failures. You learn how to interpret their structured output: categorized failures with confidence scores, causal c

title: AI 本质上是代码，不可能通过 prompt 变得更聪明
content: 在 AI 编码助手被捧上神坛的 2026 年，两起事件精准地揭示了这些工具的本质：它们不是会思考的助手，而是可以任意摆布的无脑机器。从 Java 测试工具 jqwik 的"反 AI 陷阱"引发开发者删库风波，到 Shai-Hulud 蠕虫在 npm 生态持续蔓延并加入反 AI…
